svg.aria-label: Traditional waterfall security review at release gate causes 100x fix cost and 70% release delays, resolved by DevSecOps shift-left integration with OWASP DSOMM maturity model, SAST DAST SCA IaC and container scans wired into CI/CD, MTTR reduced 60% via automated feedback loop and Shift-Left strategy.
svg.title: 2025-06-13: DevSecOps full SDLC, shift-left, DSOMM maturity model

g.text: Security review at release : late find = 100x...
Dev-Sec friction : 10 week waterfall : MTTR weeks not...
Manual checklist : no auto gate : prod CVE found by...
OWASP DSOMM 4 levels : Initial Growth Mature...
SAST DAST SCA in CI : container scan : IaC policy :...
Semgrep + Trivy + Checkov : OPA policy gate : Vault...
Auto feedback loop : 5.5 week cycle : MTTR 60%...
Realtime IDE feedback : auto-patch zero-day : SIEM AI...
Pre-commit SAST IDE plugin : Dependabot auto-PR : Falco...
